headline: Warsh FOMC hawkish shock: SPY -1.3%, QQQ -1.0%; CYTK/OCUL/HWM desk longs active — RXT +21% leads movers

market_state.line: SPY -1.27% / QQQ -1.01%, VXX stress ratio benign at 0.95; risk-on label survives but Warsh hawkish surprise pressures entries — keep sizing

actions.line: Full size. Clean risk setup, bullish signal, regime aligned — no advisor veto.
Half size. Signal agrees, risk clean low-severity; research neutral caps size.
Quarter size only. Risk-on regime supports it but all three advisors neutral — wide stop, tight sizing.

watch.line: RXT +21.5% on 2x rel volume, MACD bullish — faded from +32% prior scan; momentum cooling worth tracking.
MRNA +11.6% on 2x rel volume but flagged overbought — no desk take; watch for exhaustion/fade.
EOSE +11.8% on 2.1x unusual volume — energy storage; no catalyst confirmed, could be news-driven continuation.
CVNA -10.2% on 2.1x unusual volume, MACD bearish — notable down-mover in risk-on tape; watch for further breakdown.
FRMI +9.6% on 2.2x unusual volume, overbought flag — highest relative volume in scan; elevated fade risk.

changed: Desk takes rotated: RIVN and NU dropped, CYTK and HWM added; OCUL retained.
Macro overhang new: Warsh FOMC hawkish surprise — higher-for-longer re-enters narrative.
RXT lead mover faded from +32% to +21.5% vs previous scan.
caveats: AH_POST window (scan time 18:03 ET 2026-06-17) — prices are post-market and may gap significantly at next RTH open, especially given FOMC catalyst.
Regime reads risk-on despite SPY -1.3%; hawkish Fed surprise creates cross-asset repricing risk (USD, real yields) that may not be fully reflected in end-of-day prices.
